name: tpsreader
description: Safely inspect, query, and explicitly export Clarion TopSpeed TPS files.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Clarion TopSpeed TPS files safely
interface.longDescription: Discover schemas, run bounded read-only queries, and explicitly export Clarion TopSpeed TPS data with the TpsReader CLI.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the schema of this TPS file.
Query selected TPS fields with a safe row limit.
Export this TPS table to CSV.
